parameters.query: SELECT id, topic, pillar, notes FROM topic_ideas WHERE used = false ORDER BY priority ASC LIMIT 5
SELECT system_prompt, user_prompt_template FROM prompts WHERE pillar = '{{ $json.pillar }}' AND is_active = true LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO content_queue (title, platform, pillar, content_type, generated_content, status) VALUES ('{{ $json.title }}', '{{ $json.platform }}', '{{ $json.pillar }}', '{{ $json.content_type }}', '{{ $json.generated_content }}', '{{ $json.status }}')
UPDATE topic_ideas SET used = true WHERE id = {{ $json.topic_id }}

parameters.text:
=📦 *Batch Generation Complete*

✅ Generated posts from topic queue
📋 Platforms: LinkedIn, Facebook Tech, Facebook Chinese
⏳ Status: Pending Review

_Review at:_ http://localhost:5678
_Or use:_ /pending
